title: crepidium oculatum
intro: Crepidium oculatum, also known as the 'Eye-shaped crepidium' or 'Pigmy orchid', is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Crepidium oculatum include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, while also exhibiting potential antiviral and antifungal activities. In traditional herbal preparations, Crepidium oculatum is often used in infusions, tinctures, and decoctions to leverage its medicinal properties.
